query:
-- PHI@ATL: ATL favored -11.5, PHI +11.5, Total 220.5, Fair ML Home(ATL)=-670, Away(PHI)=+670
UPDATE games SET 
  awayModelSpread = '11.5', homeModelSpread = '-11.5',
  modelTotal = '220.5',
  modelAwayML = '+670', modelHomeML = '-670',
  publishedToFeed = 1
WHERE id = 1560013;
